title: Moosend vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Privy?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
